subject: FW: MEETING ON TUE FEB 26
body:
Wanted you to see the participants again...

 

From: egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 20, 2008 2:42 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: MEETING ON TUE FEB 26

 

Greetings again,

These are the participants in our meeting on Tuesday February 26 at
5:30pm in addition to Mr. Epstein and myself:

Yann LeCun - Professor of Computer Science at Courant Institute, NYU 

Hakwan Lau - Assistant Professor of Psychology at Columbia University

David Silbersweig - Professor of Psychiatry and Neurology at Cornell
Medical School

Best wishes,

EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA
